transcript: Speaker A: Abey chal, isse English mein kaise kahenge? [Hey go, how do we say this in English?] Speaker B: Buzz off. Speaker A: Mujhe paath mat padha, samjha? [Don't lecture me, understand?] Speaker B: Don't school me! Speaker A: Apni aukaat mein reh. [Stay in your limits.] Speaker B: Stay in your limit. Speaker A: Main tumhare jaise English fluently kab bol paunga? [When will I speak English fluently like you?] Speaker B: Kuch hi hafton mein agar tum daily practice karoge mere saath. Main MySivi ki AI teacher, tumhari har step mein madad karungi. [In a few weeks if you practice daily with me. I, MySivi's AI teacher, will help you.] Speaker A: Kya yeh mehanga hai? [Is it expensive?] Speaker B: Nahi, iska trial sirf ek rupaye ka hai. Is video ke link pe click karo aur MySivi abhi download karo. [No, its trial is only 1 rupee. Click the link and download MySivi now.]
on_screen_text: ABEY CHAL ISSE ENGLISH MEIN KAISE KAHENGE? BUZZ OFF MUJHE PAATH MAT PADHA DON'T SCHOOL ME! APNI AUKAAT MEIN REH! STAY IN YOUR LIMIT MAIN TUMHARE JAISE ENGLISH FLUENTLY KAB BOL PAUNGA? KUCHHE HAFTON MEIN AGAR TUM DAILY PRACTICE KAROGE MERE SAATH MAIN MYSIVI KI AI TEACHER, TUMHARI HAR STEP MEIN TUMHARI MADAD KARUNGI KYA YEH MEHANGA HAI? NAHI, ISKA TRIAL SIRF EK RUPEYE KA HAI MySivi Premium 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1 IS VIDEO KE LINK PE CLICK KARO AUR MYSIVI ABHI DOWNLOAD KARO.
summary: A split-screen ad where a human asks an AI avatar how to translate Hindi slang into English. The AI provides translations and promotes the MySivi app, highlighting a 3-day premium trial for 1 rupee and prompting a download.
